parameters.query:
SELECT 
    i.context, 
    i.action_id, 
    a.action_type,
    a.parameter_needed
FROM intent i
JOIN action a ON i.action_id = a.id;

SELECT 
    i.context, 
    i.action_id, 
    a.action_type,
    a.parameter_needed
FROM intent i
JOIN action a ON i.action_id = a.id;

parameters.responseBody: {"error_code": 404, "message": "Proses dibatalkan. Data intent di database sedang kosong!"}
